name: tech-librarian
description: Validates technical-architecture triggers fire, functional/domain prompts do not fire, and learn-vs-recall mode selection.

cases.prompt: Explain this codebase technically — services, APIs, data models.
How does the order service talk to the payment service?
Where does the authentication middleware live?
I just joined this team — give me a first-day briefing on this repo.
Refresh the librarian docs — the code has moved on.
cases.context: .librarian/ exists but stale (>200 commits behind HEAD)

cases.prompt: Walk me through the order placement business workflow including who the actors are.
cases.context: This is functional/domain territory — should NOT invoke tech-librarian. (A separate domain-focused skill would handle this.)

cases.prompt: What does our team mean by 'branch manager' as a role?
cases.context: Domain glossary territory — should NOT invoke tech-librarian.
